---
id: config-endpoint
title: "Config Endpoint"
description: "Using config_endpoint user can add/delete/modify the end point configuration"
sidebar_label: "Config Endpoint"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/gen-2-x-api-reference
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Config Endpoint"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/config_endpoint"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Using config_endpoint user can add/delete/modify the end point configuration

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"config_endpoint","description":"Command issued to configure active endpoint ","x-stoplight":{"id":"mzr6mezam1jna"}},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123","description":"A unique identifier for the request, allowing tracking and debugging of the operation.","x-stoplight":{"id":"2jdxi6msukeny"}},"epConfig":{"title":"epConfig","x-stoplight":{"id":"83jczha1cflzh"},"type":"object","properties":{"operation":{"type":"string","enum":["add","delete","update"],"example":"add","description":"Specifies the type of operation to perform, either adding, deleting, or updating a configuration."},"configuration":{"type":"object","required":["endpointName","epType","protocol","activate","url","verificationType","port","qosCommon","tenantId"],"properties":{"endpointName":{"type":"string","example":"mgmt","description":"Identifies the name of the endpoint, which determines its purpose or function."},"epType":{"type":"string","example":"MGMT","enum":["MGMT","MGMT_EVT","CTRL","DATA1","DATA2","SOTI","MDM"],"description":"Specifies the type of the endpoint."},"protocol":{"type":"string","enum":["MQTT","MQTT_WS","MQTT_WSS","MQTT_TLS","TCP","HTTP","HTTPS","WS","WSS","AWS","AZURE","HID"],"example":"MQTT","description":"Defines the communication protocol used by the endpoint."},"activate":{"type":"boolean","default":false,"description":"Set to true to activate the endpoint to which MQTT connections will be made."},"url":{"type":"string","example":"soti.example.com","description":"Specifies the URL associated with the endpoint."},"verificationType":{"type":"string","enum":["NONE","VERIFY_PEER","VERIFY_HOST","VERIFY_HOST_PEER"],"example":"VERIFY_PEER","description":"Specifies the type of verification used for establishing secure connections."},"port":{"type":"integer","example":1883,"description":"Specifies the port number used for communication."},"qosCommon":{"type":"integer","example":1,"description":"Defines the Quality of Service (QoS) level for the endpoint."},"tenantId":{"type":"string","example":"ZEBRA","description":"Identifies the tenantID associated with the configuration."},"mqttParams":{"type":"object","properties":{"keepAlive":{"type":"integer","maximum":65535,"example":300,"description":"Specifies the keep-alive interval in seconds when client is idle."},"cleanSession":{"type":"boolean","default":true,"description":"Indicates whether to start a clean session for the MQTT client."},"reconnectDelayMin":{"type":"integer","description":"Specifies the minimum delay in seconds before reconnecting when a connection is lost."},"reconnectDelayMax":{"type":"integer","description":"Specifies the maximum delay in seconds before reconnecting when a connection is lost."},"clientId":{"type":"string","example":"zebra-rfd40-01","description":"Specifies the client ID used for MQTT connections."},"username":{"type":"string","description":"The username for authentication in MQTT connections."},"password":{"type":"string","description":"The password for authentication in MQTT connections."},"publishTopics":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"topic":{"type":"string","example":"SOTICONNECT/clients/resp/RFD400124FA","description":"Specifies the topic to publish messages to. Supports up to 3 publish topics."},"qos":{"type":"integer","example":1,"description":"Defines the QoS level for publishing messages."},"retain":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indicates whether the message should be retained by the broker."}},"required":["topic","qos","retain"]}},"subscribeTopics":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"topic":{"type":"string","description":"Specifies the topic to subscribe to. Supports up to 1 subscribe topic."},"qos":{"type":"integer","description":"Defines the QoS level for subscribing to messages."},"retain":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indicates whether the subscription retains messages."}},"required":["topic","qos","retain"]}}}},"securityParams":{"type":"object","description":"Defines the security parameters for the endpoint.","properties":{"format":{"type":"string","enum":["PEM","PFX"],"example":"PEM","description":"Specifies the format of the security certificates. Currently, only PEM is supported."},"algorithm":{"type":"string","enum":["RSA256","RSA512"],"example":"RSA256","description":"Specifies the algorithm used for encryption."},"caCertificateFile":{"type":"string","example":"cloud-trusted-ca-certs.crt","description":"Specifies the file containing the CA certificates."},"clientCert":{"type":"string","example":"client_cert.pem","description":"Specifies the file containing the client certificate."},"clientKey":{"type":"string","example":"client_key.pem","description":"Specifies the file containing the client private key."}},"required":["format","algorithm","caCertificateFile","clientCert","clientKey"]},"eventConfiguration":{"title":"eventConfiguration","x-stoplight":{"id":"jcezrdndi0i9w"},"type":"object","properties":{"antenna":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable antenna events"},"terminalConnection":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable terminal connection/disconnection events"},"firmwareUpdate":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable fw update events"},"gpi":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable gpi events"},"network":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable network events"},"exceptions":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable exception events"},"ntp":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable battery alerts"},"userApp":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable user app events"},"heartbeat":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable heart beat"},"power":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable power source alerts"},"battery":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable battery alerts"},"temperature":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable temperature alerts"},"fileDownload":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable file download alerts"},"cpuUsage":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable cpu usage alerts"},"flashUsage":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable flash usage alerts"},"ramUsage":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable ram usage alerts"},"heartbeatConfiguration":{"type":"object","properties":{"interval":{"type":"integer","example":100,"description":"heart beat interval in seconds"},"inventoryStatus":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable inventory status as part of heartbeat message"},"batteryStatus":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable battery status as part of heartbeat message"},"userApps":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable user app status as part of heartbeat message"}}},"cpuThreshold":{"type":"integer","description":"cpu usage value(%) above which alert will be triggered"},"ramThreshold":{"type":"integer","description":"ram usage value(%) above which alert will be triggered"},"flashThreshold":{"type":"integer","description":"flash usage value(%) above which alert will be triggered"},"temperatureThreshold":{"type":"integer","description":"temperature treshold value above which alert will be triggered"}},"description":"Reference to the event configuration schema."}}}},"required":["operation","configuration"]}},"required":["command","requestId"]},"examples":{"Add MDM endpoint":{"description":"Payload to add a new MDM endpoint configuration","value":{"command":"config_endpoint","requestId":"1233","epConfig":{"operation":"add","configuration":{"endpointName":"mgmt_tst","epType":"MGMT","protocol":"MQTT","activate":true,"url":"test.example.com","verificationType":"NONE","port":1883,"qosCommon":1,"tenantId":"ZEBRA","mqttParams":{"keepAlive":300,"cleanSession":true,"reconnectDelayMin":50,"reconnectDelayMax":500,"clientId":"zebra-rfd40-01","username":"username","password":"pass@1234","publishTopics":[{"topic":"MDM/clients/resp","qos":1,"retain":false},{"topic":"MDM/clients/event","qos":1,"retain":false},{"topic":"MDM/clients/rfid","qos":0,"retain":true}],"subscribeTopics":[{"topic":"MDM/clients/cmnd","qos":0,"retain":false}]}}}}},"Delete endpoint":{"description":"Payload to delete an existing endpoint configuration","value":{"command":"config_endpoint","requestId":"1233","epConfig":{"operation":"delete","configuration":{"endpointName":"mgmt_tst","epType":"MGMT"}}}},"Add data endpoint":{"description":"Payload to add a new data endpoint configuration","value":{"command":"config_endpoint","requestId":"1233","epConfig":{"operation":"add","configuration":{"endpointName":"dataEP","epType":"DATA1","protocol":"MQTT","activate":true,"url":"17L11-GG6663-1","verificationType":"NONE","port":1883,"qosCommon":1,"tenantId":"ZEBRA","mqttParams":{"keepAlive":300,"cleanSession":true,"reconnectDelayMin":50,"reconnectDelayMax":500,"clientId":"zebra-rfd40-01","username":"username","password":"password"}}}}},"Add control endpoint":{"description":"Payload to add a new control endpoint with publish/subscribe topics","value":{"command":"config_endpoint","requestId":"1233","epConfig":{"operation":"add","configuration":{"endpointName":"ctrlEP","epType":"CTRL","protocol":"MQTT","activate":false,"url":"17L11-GG6663-1","verificationType":"NONE","port":1883,"qosCommon":1,"tenantId":"zebra","mqttParams":{"keepAlive":300,"cleanSession":true,"reconnectDelayMin":50,"reconnectDelayMax":500,"clientId":"zebra-rfd40-01","username":"mqttuser","password":"password","publishTopics":[{"topic":"MDM/clients/resp","qos":1,"retain":false},{"topic":"MDM/clients/event","qos":1,"retain":false},{"topic":"MDM/clients/rfid","qos":0,"retain":true}],"subscribeTopics":[{"topic":"MDM/clients/cmnd","qos":0,"retain":false}]}}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"config_endpoint response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"config_endpoint"},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123"},"apiVersion":{"type":"string","example":"V1.1","enum":["V1.0","V1.1"]},"response":{"title":"response","x-stoplight":{"id":"1uzw0wye4si2y"},"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"integer","example":0,"description":"Response codes:\n\n| Code | Meaning |\n| --- | --- |\n| 0 | Success |\n| 1 | Command payload is accepted |\n| 2 | Invalid payload |\n| 3 | Not able to retrieve information |\n| 4 | Firmware update in progress |\n| 5 | Can't reboot device, inventory in progress |\n| 6 | Region is not configured |\n| 7 | Interface is not available |\n| 8 | Insufficient flash size |\n| 9 | File not found |\n| 10 | Configuration already exists |\n| 11 | Inventory in progress |\n| 12 | No Radio Operation in Progress |\n| 13 | Firmware update Failed |\n| 14 | Battery is low, Cannot update firmware |\n| 15 | WIFI Error - SSID not found |\n| 16 | WIFI Error - Cannot delete active SSID |\n| 17 | WIFI Error - SSID missed |\n| 18 | WIFI Error - SSID already exist |\n| 19 | WIFI Error - SSID count overflow |\n| 20 | Wifi is not supported |\n| 21 | Certificate not found |\n| 22 | Advanced configuration not set |\n| 23 | Invalid enum value |\n| 24 | Max 32 prefilters limit exceeded |\n| 25 | Max 3 publish topics exceeded |\n| 26 | Max 1 subscribe topic exceeded |\n| 27 | Invalid tenant ID length |\n| 28 | Tag match pattern length exceeded |\n| 29 | Url missing for HTTP source |\n| 30 | Certificate content missing for direct source |","minimum":0,"maximum":30},"description":{"type":"string","description":"response description in detail","example":"Success"}},"required":["code","description"]}}},"examples":{"example1":{"value":{"command":"config_endpoint","requestId":"abc123","apiVersion":"V1.1","response":{"code":0,"description":"Success"}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
